debug_info.goal:
case right
C : Type
inst✝¹ : Category.{0, 0} C
K : Type
inst✝ : DivisionRing K
M : CategoryTheory.Functor C (ModuleCat K)
I : @DirectSumDecomposition C inst✝¹ K inst✝ M
c : C
⊢ ⨆ p, ↑p c = ⊤

failed_attempts:
· rw [← PersistenceSubmodule.independent_apply]
    exact I.sSupIndep
  · simp [iSup_subtype, pointwise_iSup_eq_top]

· intro p
    have h := I.sSupIndep p p.2
    simp only [disjoint_iff, PersistenceSubmodule.inf_apply, PersistenceSubmodule.bot_apply] at h ⊢
    rw [← h]
    congr 1
    simp [PersistenceSubmodule.sSup_apply, sSup_image, iSup_subtype]
  · simp [← PersistenceSubmodule.top_apply, ← I.sSup_eq_top, PersistenceSubmodule.sSup_apply, sSup_image, iSup_subtype]

intro i
    have := I.sSupIndep.disjoint_sSup i.prop
    rw [disjoint_iff] at this ⊢; apply_fun (· c) at this
    simpa [PersistenceSubmodule.inf_apply, PersistenceSubmodule.bot_apply,
      PersistenceSubmodule.sSup_apply, sSup_eq_iSup] using this
  · have := I.sSup_eq_top
    apply_fun (· c) at this
    simpa [PersistenceSubmodule.top_apply, PersistenceSubmodule.sSup_apply,
      sSup_eq_iSup] using this

· intro p
    have := I.sSupIndep p.2
    rw [disjoint_iff] at this ⊢
    rw [← PersistenceSubmodule.inf_apply, this, PersistenceSubmodule.bot_apply]
    congr 1
    simp only [PersistenceSubmodule.sSup_apply, sSup_image, iSup_subtype, iSup_and]
    rfl
  · rw [iSup_subtype]
    exact I.pointwise_iSup_eq_top c

· have h := I.sSupIndep
    rw [SetLike.coe_sSupIndep_iff_iSupIndep, PersistenceSubmodule.independent_iff_pointwise] at h
    exact h c
  · exact pointwise_iSup_eq_top I c

· intro i
    simpa [PersistenceSubmodule.inf_apply, PersistenceSubmodule.iSup_apply, PersistenceSubmodule.bot_apply, disjoint_iff]
      using sSupIndep_iff_independent.mp I.sSupIndep' i
  · simp [← PersistenceSubmodule.iSup_apply, ← sSup_eq_iSup', I.sSup_eq_top, PersistenceSubmodule.top_apply]

· have h := sSupIndep_iff_independent.mp I.sSupIndep'
    exact h.map_orderHom ⟨fun p ↦ p c, fun _ _ h ↦ h c⟩ (fun _ _ h ↦ h c)
  · change (⨆ p : I, p.val) c = ⊤
    rw [← sSup_eq_iSup, I.sSup_eq_top]
    rfl

intro q
    simp [Subtype.coe_ne_coe]
  · simp only [← PersistenceSubmodule.eval_top (x := c), ← I.sSup_eq_top',
      PersistenceSubmodule.eval_sSup, sSup_image, iSup_subtype]

· rw [← PersistenceSubmodule.independent_iff]
    exact I.sSupIndep'.independent_subtype_coe
  · simp only [← PersistenceSubmodule.iSup_apply, ← sSup_eq_iSup', I.sSup_eq_top',
      PersistenceSubmodule.top_apply]

· intro i
    have := congr_arg (· c) ((sSupIndep_iff_independent_coe _).mp I.sSupIndep i).eq_bot
    simpa using this
  · have := congr_arg (· c) I.sSup_eq_top
    simpa [sSup_eq_iSup] using this

· intro i
    have := I.sSupIndep.disjoint_sSup_diff i.1 i.2
    simp only [disjoint_iff, PersistenceSubmodule.inf_apply, PersistenceSubmodule.bot_apply,
      PersistenceSubmodule.sSup_apply] at this ⊢
    convert this using 1
    simp only [iSup_subtype, iSup_and]
    rfl
  · apply pointwise_iSup_eq_top

· rw [CompleteLattice.independent_def]
    intro i
    have := I.sSupIndep i.2
    simp only [disjoint_iff] at this ⊢
    apply_fun (fun p ↦ p c) at this
    simpa using this
  · have := I.sSup_eq_top
    apply_fun (fun p ↦ p c) at this
    simpa [sSup_eq_iSup] using this

· rw [← PersistenceSubmodule.independent_iff]
    exact sSupIndep_iff_independent.mp I.sSupIndep
  · convert pointwise_iSup_eq_top I c
    simp

· intro i
    rw [disjoint_iff, ← PersistenceSubmodule.eval_inf, ← PersistenceSubmodule.eval_sSup]
    exact I.sSupIndep.disjoint_sSup_compl i.2
  · apply I.pointwise_iSup_eq_top

(CompleteLattice.set_independent_iff_sSupIndep _).mpr I.sSupIndep i) c
  · show (⨆ p : I, p.val) c = ⊤
    rw [← sSup_eq_iSup, I.sSup_eq_top]
    rfl

· intro i
    have := (I.sSupIndep i.val i.2).eq_bot
    replace this := congr_arg (fun p ↦ p.val c) this
    simp at this
    exact this
  · apply pointwise_iSup_eq_top

· intro p
    have := I.sSupIndep p.2
    rw [disjoint_iff] at this ⊢
    apply_fun (fun x ↦ x c) at this
    simpa using this
  · apply pointwise_iSup_eq_top

intro j; apply iSup_le; intro hj
    apply le_sSup
    exact ⟨j.1, ⟨j.2, SetLike.coe_injective.ne hj⟩, rfl⟩
  · exact I.pointwise_iSup_eq_top c

· intro i
    have h := I.sSupIndep i.1 i.2
    rw [disjoint_iff] at h ⊢
    apply_fun (· c) at h
    simpa using h
  · exact pointwise_iSup_eq_top I c

· intro i
    have := sSupIndep_iff_independent.mp I.sSupIndep i
    rw [disjoint_iff] at this ⊢
    simp at this ⊢
    exact this
  · rw [← I.sSup_eq_top, sSup_eq_iSup]
    simp

· intro i
    have := I.sSupIndep i i.2
    rw [disjoint_iff] at this ⊢
    rw [← PersistenceSubmodule.inf_apply, this, PersistenceSubmodule.bot_apply]
    congr 1
    simp only [PersistenceSubmodule.sSup_apply, sSup_image]
    rw [iSup_subtype, iSup_subtype]
    rfl
  · simp only [← PersistenceSubmodule.sSup_apply, I.sSup_eq_top, PersistenceSubmodule.top_apply, sSup_eq_iSup]
    rfl

· sorry
  · rw [iSup_subtype, pointwise_iSup_eq_top]

· rw [iSupIndep_iff]
    intro i
    have h := I.sSupIndep i.2
    rw [disjoint_iff] at h ⊢
    rw [← PersistenceSubmodule.inf_apply, h, PersistenceSubmodule.bot_apply]
    congr 1
    simp [PersistenceSubmodule.sSup_apply, sSup_image, iSup_subtype]
  · rw [← PersistenceSubmodule.iSup_apply]
    simp [iSup_subtype, ← sSup_eq_iSup, I.sSup_eq_top, PersistenceSubmodule.top_apply]

· simp_rw [CompleteLattice.Independent, disjoint_iff, ← PersistenceSubmodule.inf_apply,

    exact fun i ↦ I.sSupIndep.independent i
  · rw [← PersistenceSubmodule.iSup_apply, ← sSup_eq_iSup, I.sSup_eq_top,

· exact PersistenceSubmodule.iSupIndep_apply c I.sSupIndep
  · exact pointwise_iSup_eq_top I c

· sorry
  · rw [← I.sSup_eq_top']
    rfl

· intro i
    have := I.sSupIndep i i.2
    rw [disjoint_iff] at this ⊢
    replace this := congr_arg (· c) this
    simpa only [PersistenceSubmodule.inf_apply, PersistenceSubmodule.sSup_apply,
      PersistenceSubmodule.bot_apply, sSup_eq_iSup, iSup_subtype, iSup_and] using this
  · apply pointwise_iSup_eq_top

· rw [iSupIndep_iff]
    intro p
    simpa using congr_arg (fun q ↦ q.val c) (sSupIndep_iff.mp I.sSupIndep p.1 p.2).eq_bot
  · simpa using congr_arg (fun q ↦ q.val c) I.sSup_eq_top

· intro i
    apply_fun (· c) at I.sSupIndep.independent_coe i
    simpa [PersistenceSubmodule.iSup_apply, PersistenceSubmodule.inf_apply, PersistenceSubmodule.bot_apply] using this
  · simp [← PersistenceSubmodule.iSup_apply, ← sSup_eq_iSup, I.sSup_eq_top, PersistenceSubmodule.top_apply]

· intro i
    have h := I.sSupIndep i.2
    rw [disjoint_iff] at h ⊢
    simpa using congr_arg (· c) h
  · have h := I.sSup_eq_top
    simpa using congr_arg (· c) h

· intro i
    have := I.sSupIndep.independent i
    simp only [disjoint_iff] at this ⊢
    rw [← PersistenceSubmodule.inf_apply, ← PersistenceSubmodule.iSup_apply, this]
    exact PersistenceSubmodule.bot_apply c
  · rw [← PersistenceSubmodule.iSup_apply, ← sSup_eq_iSup, I.sSup_eq_top]
    exact PersistenceSubmodule.top_apply c

· intro i
    rw [disjoint_iff]
    simpa using congr_arg (· c) (I.sSupIndep' i.2).eq_bot
  · simpa using congr_arg (· c) I.sSup_eq_top'
